title: Weapons of India
description: Weapons of India adds 9 new weapon types inspired by Indian history.
body:
![bg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/c4ef73a764f99001788305e60bb8f7a24989862a.png)

**[Aquarius Libs](https://modrinth.com/mod/aquarius-libs) and [Pisces Libs](https://modrinth.com/mod/pisces-libs) needs to be installed for this mod to work!**

 

Weapons of India adds 9 new weapon types inspired by Indian history.

The items can be crafted from wood, stone, copper, iron, gold, diamond and can be upgraded into netherite weapons.

 ---

**Bagh Nakh (Tiger Claw):** A concealable weapon designed for lightning-fast strikes. While it deals low damage and can only hit a single target, its incredible speed allows you to overwhelm foes before they can react.

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/eb61172ccce99751557ba3c32ad3895419c15102.gif)

 
 ---
**Katar (Push Dagger):** This iconic H-shaped handle dagger offers a balanced combat experience. It features fast attack speeds and reliable damage, making it a versatile choice for close-quarters skirmishes.

![2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/2ecdc8ce3ce38677e3ca7bf8649751fab828ed23.gif)
 
 ---
**Bhuj (Axe-Knife):** Named for its elephant-head carvings, this hybrid weapon functions with the rhythm of a standard sword. It provides consistent damage and normal swing speeds for steady combat.

![3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/8c4e1a6b0e46847658cfaf87a71dfd6195d28add.gif)

 
 ---
**Mudgar (Mace):** A heavy training club turned weapon. The Mudgar excels in fluid, repetitive striking patterns. It focuses all its kinetic energy on a single enemy, delivering crushing blows with surprising momentum.

![4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/fb360112ffa94ff28d209f9bdf8c71e845caab5f.gif)

 
 ---
**Khanda (Sword):** The classic blunt-tipped Indian straight sword. It serves as a dependable primary weapon, offering a familiar feel with standard reach, speed, and damage output.

![5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/516e7c0fbaf888bcc8dd761eeb4b4b684d55f98d.gif)

 
 ---
**Madu(vu) (Deer Horn Shield):** A unique dual-purpose tool consisting of double-bladed daggers attached to a small shield. It allows you to strike quickly while maintaining a defense, though both actions deplete durability.(ps. no deer horns were harmed by creating these weapons.... for now)

![6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/510ba8d348604c699b85c2d836ca63792a5b92f2.gif)

 
 ---
**Pata(dandpatta) (Gauntlet-Sword):** This sword features an integrated gauntlet for superior hand protection. It extends slightly further than a standard blade, also granting a small interaction range bonus.

![7](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/34ca0b1d86a6d18537a4e66a4700a19415064aba.gif)

 
 ---
**Lathi (Traditional Baton):** A heavy, bamboo or iron-tipped staff used for crowd control. Its massive size provides a significant interaction range bonus, allowing you to keep enemies at a distance with powerful strikes.

![8](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/2d86f641fd2e808592491c165d1d2fcd4f2af1ea.gif)

 
 ---
**Chakram:** A razor-sharp throwing disk that can be used in melee or hurled at distant targets. This versatile weapon can be upgraded using both Sword and Trident enchantments, making it a deadly projectile.


![9](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/6jBPlNn2/images/8f7470a0041a4fbb8d18d846c7e1c61df6584bd1.gif)
 

 
 ---
 
(The weapons description is taken from wikipedia and other places so you can understand more about the weapon as one of the goals of the mod is that you learn about their existence)

The main goal of the mod is to have more weapon variants, not to add overpowered items.

**Currently supports forge, fabric and neoforge 1.21.5 - 1.21.11, 26.1.x.**

Versions below 1.21.5. are not supported.
